description_long: This stool features a cylindrical, solid green base that serves as the seat, topped with a rounded wooden backrest and three vertical wooden supports. The seat is upholstered or finished in a matte green material, giving it a soft yet structured appearance. The backrest is composed of a single curved wooden rod, smoothly bent to form a partial arc, and is supported by three evenly spaced vertical wooden dowels. The design is minimalist, with no visible fasteners or decorative embellishments, emphasizing clean lines and functional form. The stool's construction suggests a blend of comfort and durability, suitable for public or urban environments such as parks, plazas, or waiting areas. The combination of wood and green upholstery gives it a contemporary yet natural aesthetic.
description: A modern stool with a green cylindrical seat and a curved wooden backrest supported by three vertical wooden rods. The design is minimalist and functional, blending wood and green upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular green seat and the curved wooden backrest with three vertical supports.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the cylindrical seat and the arc of the wooden backrest, with one support partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the three vertical wooden supports and the continuous curve of the backrest.
description_view_3: Side-rear view emphasizing the curvature of the backrest and the alignment of the wooden supports.
